name: Ultimate Brain
tagline: GTD task manager for your glasses
description: View today's tasks, process your inbox, and capture new tasks by voice — all from your Even Realities G2 glasses.
author: mediato.dev

permissions.name: network
permissions.desc: Connect to the local Notion Ultimate Brain server to sync Notion tasks and forward voice transcripts.

permissions.name: g2-microphone
permissions.desc: Capture voice on the glasses for new task entry.
